rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when they refer to component ports
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for all AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equation declarations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings such as assignments
Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless typed ports or constants are exposed
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value for range comparisons
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers for range comparisons
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
Implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Model Analyst Agent's role in extracting AADL structure
